goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 accepted-memory receipt 校验预检入口

summary.title: 增加 accepted-memory receipt 校验预检入口
summary.what: 新增 src/catty/accepted-memory-receipt-verify.ts，从 pending catty_accepted_memory_write_requests 只读校验外部 AcceptedMemoryWriteReceipt，并输出 verified / blocked 结果；新增 src/catty/accepted-memory-receipt-verify.test.ts 覆盖 matching receipt、memoryId mismatch、missing receipt 和缺表 side-effect-free；更新 src/catty/README.md 的链路说明和 CLI 入口。
summary.why: 上一层 writer preflight 已能预览 future writer receipt，但真实 writer 返回 receipt 后，进入 commitMemoryCanaryPromotionApplyReceipts 之前还需要一个只读校验层，防止 memoryId、destination 或 evidence 不匹配的坏 receipt 触发 Catty apply commit。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 accepted-memory receipt 校验预检入口

decisions.point: receipt 校验层放在哪个边界
decisions.chose: 放在真实 accepted-memory writer 返回 receipt 之后、receipt-backed apply commit 之前
decisions.rationale: 这样后续 commit 协议只消费 verified receipt bundle，避免把外部 writer 输出直接送入 promoted apply commit。
rejected: 直接开放 apply commit CLI

decisions.chose: dry-run only，只输出 verified / blocked，不写任何表或状态
decisions.rationale: 本轮目标是降低污染风险和明确合同，不应写 user memory、catty_memory_audit、apply receipt 或 promoted status。

decisions.chose: 要求 receipt 匹配 pending request 的 canary、proposed memory id、destination 和 required evidence
decisions.rationale: 这些条件覆盖后续 apply commit 的关键安全输入，尤其是 user-prior memory id 和 request provenance。

rejected.alternative: 在本轮实现真实 user memory writer 或 accepted-memory 持久层
rejected.reason: 会跨过 v0 当前预检/合同切片边界，并引入正式 memory 写入风险。

rejected.alternative: receipt 缺失时静默返回空 verified
rejected.reason: pending request 没有 receipt 是需要显式阻断的状态，应输出 missing_receipt blocked reason。

review_notes: 本轮实际 commit 为 f0cf9d6，代码范围是 src/catty/README.md、src/catty/accepted-memory-receipt-verify.ts、src/catty/accepted-memory-receipt-verify.test.ts。
Mainline prepare 的 diff_summary 包含 catty 分支从旧 base 累积的历史文件；本轮 proposed overlaps 已按同一 catty 分支连续切片分类，不作为语义冲突。
mainline append 因并发调用重复记录了一次同内容 turn；它不是两轮不同工作。
工作区仍有无关 unstaged CLAUDE.md，未 stage、未提交、未纳入本轮。
验证：RED 缺模块失败；GREEN focused test 3 pass；相关链路 32 pass；Catty 全量 52 pass；全仓 bun test 57 pass；CLI --help、空库 dry-run、bad JSON exit 2；git diff --check；git diff --cached --check。

architectural_claims: Accepted-memory receipt verification is a read-only boundary after external writer output and before receipt-backed apply commit.
Verified receipts can be passed to commitMemoryCanaryPromotionApplyReceipts by a later explicit commit path, but this preflight itself performs no writes.
behavioral_changes: External AcceptedMemoryWriteReceipt inputs are matched against pending accepted-memory write requests.
Receipt verification blocks missing receipts, memory id mismatches, destination mismatches, missing evidence, and receipts without pending requests.
Missing request table returns an empty dry-run result without creating Catty tables.
CLI rejects --write and reports invalid --receipt-json with exit code 2.
security_implications: No secrets are read or logged.
No user memory, catty_memory_audit, apply receipt, canary status, model call, heartbeat, or nightly runner side effect is performed.
Bad or incomplete external receipt data is blocked before the apply commit protocol can consume it.
migration_notes: No migration required; the verifier only reads the existing request table and returns empty output when it is absent.
